name: capsicum annuum
title: capsicum annuum benefits
description: Capsicum annuum boosts immune system by providing a natural defense mechanism that helps protect the body against pathogens and infections, thereby preventing illnesses and diseases. This benefit is crucial as a weakened immune system can lead to serious health issues, such as increased susceptibility to infections, autoimmune disorders, and even life-threatening conditions like sepsis or organ failure.
